sizing_rule.note: Scale position units to account equity using formula: Position_Units = Account_Equity / (50000 * 1.5). Constraint: notional value must not exceed 15x account equity. Implied max risk ≈ 6.7% per trade (1/15). Rebalance monthly.

source_rule_text: A trader should scale position size according to account equity rather than taking fixed units, to prevent over-leverage and ensure risk remains proportional to capital regardless of account size.
